meaning: vt.璇遍獥,鍝勯獥,楠楀緱vi.鍝勯獥
examples: Cross decided to beg and wheedle a bit.
He managed to wheedle his way into the offices.
The kids can always wheedle money out of their father.
We argue, we reason, we cajole, we promise, we wheedle, we make deals.
The emperors now had to wheedle taxes and manpower from these great powers.
